display.purpose: Page-level headings and print sheet titles.

headline.purpose: Major dashboard, list, intake, and review sections.

title.purpose: Project cards, queue cards, and repeated work surfaces.

body.purpose: Help text, review copy, and project metadata.

label.purpose: Status chips, table headers, and compact review category labels.

shadows.name: soft-work-surface
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient separation for major cards, forms, and print toolbars.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover and focus state transition. Use motion for state feedback only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for creating, saving, generating, applying, and opening the next workflow step.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #48634f; color: #ffffff; border: 0; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 600 0.875rem/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, #48634f 90%, #000000); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(72, 99, 79, 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { cursor: wait; background: color-mix(in srgb, #48634f 70%, #ffffff); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Alternate action for clear filters, print, restore, and navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #1f2520; border: 1px solid #e8dccb; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 600 0.875rem/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f7f4ef; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(72, 99, 79, 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #48634f; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard project intake and filter control.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; color: #1f2520; font: 600 0.875rem/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e8dccb; background: #ffffff; color: #1f2520; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(31, 37, 32, 0.5); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #48634f; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(72, 99, 79, 0.2); }

components.name: Work Surface Card
components.description: Default white task container for dashboards, forms, filters, and review panels.
components.html:
Planning aid

Private Boardsmith workspace

Review dimensions, materials, fasteners, and safety before building.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; color: #1f2520; border: 1px solid #e8dccb; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(31, 37, 32, 0.08); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card h2 { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card p { margin: 0.5rem 0 0; color: rgba(31, 37, 32, 0.7); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-kicker { margin: 0; color: #48634f; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font: 600 0.75rem/1.25 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.025em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-ready { background: rgba(72, 99, 79, 0.1); color: #48634f; } .ds-chip-neutral { background: #f7f4ef; color: rgba(31, 37, 32, 0.7); } .ds-chip-warning { background: #fef3c7; color: #78350f; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Private workspace route navigation that wraps on smaller screens.
components.html: BoardsmithDashboardProjectsNew Project
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8dccb; background: rgba(247, 244, 239, 0.95); padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-brand { color: #1f2520; text-decoration: none; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-nav-links a { color: rgba(31, 37, 32, 0.75); border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-links a:hover, .ds-nav-links a:focus-visible { background: #e8dccb; color: #1f2520; outline: none; }

narrative.overview: Boardsmith should feel like a clean digital workbench: useful tools close at hand, labels where they reduce hesitation, and warnings visible before the user mistakes a plan for approval. The current system is a restrained product UI built from shop-neutral surfaces, moss-green action affordances, dark ink text, sawdust borders, and compact cards.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained light UI with tinted workshop neutrals.
Moss green reserved for primary actions, links, and ready states.
Compact cards and dense scan surfaces for repeated private use.
Safety, review, and planning-aid language kept close to actions.
Print-aware surfaces that stay useful on paper.
Work-queue dashboards, state-forward project pages, and job-packet print views.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Moss is the product's action color. Do not introduce competing blue, purple, or neon CTAs.

rules.name: The Warning Is Functional Rule
rules.body: Amber and rust exist to mark review work and safety caution. They are not decorative brand colors.

rules.name: The Status Is Text Rule
rules.body: Color can reinforce draft, plan generated, needs review, ready to print, archived, manual plan, success, warning, and destructive states, but text must carry the meaning.

rules.name: The Plain Label Rule
rules.body: Labels must clarify workflow state or review category. Do not add decorative eyebrows to every section.

rules.name: The Measurement Clarity Rule
rules.body: Numeric values, measurements, quantities, and cut-list data must be easy to distinguish. Do not hide important builder information in tiny secondary text.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Use sawdust borders and tonal backgrounds before adding a shadow.

dos: Do keep the product register: design serves project creation, plan review, safety checks, and print readability.
Do make the page's primary action obvious and keep secondary actions from competing.
Do use Moss Action for primary actions, current selection, links, and ready states.
Do keep review copy near actions that could otherwise imply build readiness.
Do use plain action copy: Review before building, Generate plan, Print plan sheet, Tweak this plan, Archive project, Restore project, No plan yet, Needs review.
Do validate mobile layout for UI changes and print layout for printable plan changes.
donts: Don't make Boardsmith look like a SaaS marketing site, maker-hype landing page, playful AI toy, hobby blog, CAD or professional engineering package, Etsy or marketplace workflow, shopping assistant, or public portfolio system.

Don't imply structural approval, load ratings, child-safety certification, fabrication readiness, export/CAD/CNC output, public sharing, payments, subscriptions, inventory, pricing, vendors, or production multi-user readiness.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, bouncy motion, decorative side-stripe borders, or repeated identical icon-card grids.
Don't hide safety notes, primary build steps, review-before-building content, or the main next action behind disclosure.
